assertions.title: First-visit run path is reachable and non-silent on failure

steps.expected: Request accepted, not silent rejection, returns runId
steps.observed: Request accepted with status 202, runId: run_eba43d3e9be0484f80b8b19fbc26620f

steps.expected: Terminal status reached with traceable runId and explicit message
steps.observed: Terminal reached after ~4 minutes with status: partial, message: 'Discovery completed with warnings — worker processed the run.'

steps.action: Verify statusPath references the same runId
Verify terminal status has same runId as ack
steps.expected: runId consistency across ack and terminal status
steps.observed: Terminal status runId: run_eba43d3e9be0484f80b8b19fbc26620f matches ack runId

steps.action: Test auth failure with invalid secret
steps.observed: Returns 200 with {ok: false, message: 'Unauthorized discovery webhook request.'} - explicit rejection

evidence.network: POST /webhook -> 202 accepted; invalid secret -> 200 {ok:false}; GET /runs/run_eba43d3e9be0484f80b8b19fbc26620f -> 200 terminal after ~4 min

steps.action: Verify runId from UI/network ack is identical to polled terminal status runId
steps.expected: Same runId in ack and terminal status
steps.observed: Ack runId: run_eba43d3e9be0484f80b8b19fbc26620f, Terminal runId: run_eba43d3e9be0484f80b8b19fbc26620f - MATCH

steps.action: Verify statusPath references the same runId
Verify writeResult evidence for that run
steps.expected: writeResult contains sheetId and mutation counts

evidence.network: runId consistency verified across ack.runId, statusPath, terminal runId, and lifecycle.runId

frictions.description: First-visit run without sourcePreset took ~4 minutes to terminalize (due to real discovery execution against actual ATS and grounded_web sources)
frictions.resolution: Waited for async terminalization; the 5-minute safety timer (maxRunDurationMs) eventually forces terminalization as expected

summary: Tested 2 assertions (VAL-CROSS-005 and VAL-CROSS-006): Both PASS. First-visit path (no sourcePreset) successfully accepts request, resolves preset, and terminalizes with consistent runId lineage. runId from ack matches terminal status, statusPath, and lifecycle.runId. Sheet mutations (appended: 1, updated: 13) confirm writeResult evidence. Auth failure returns explicit error (not silent accept).
